heading: Transferred
label: 250 to 250p Transferred
notes: CodificationSections 250 to 250n were transferred to sections 500 to 500n, respectively, of Title 25, Indians, and subsequently were omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Section 250, , , declared purpose of sections 250 to 250n of this title for establishment of a reindeer industry.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 150 Stat. 900Section 250a, , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to acquire reindeer and other property.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 250 Stat. 900Section 250b, , , required filing of claims to title to reindeer by nonnatives.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 350 Stat. 900Section 250c, , , authorized Secretary to accept gifts for purposes of sections 250 to 250n of this title.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 450 Stat. 900Section 250d, , , empowered Secretary to receive and expand loans, grants, or allocations for purposes of sections 250 to 250n of this title.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 550 Stat. 900Section 250e, , , established a revolving fund for purposes of sections 250 to 250n of this title.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 650 Stat. 900Section 250f, , , related to management of reindeer industry.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 750 Stat. 900Section 250g, , , empowered Secretary to distribute reindeer, property, and profits to natives.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 850 Stat. 901Section 250h, , , authorized Secretary to grant administrative powers to organizations of natives.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 950 Stat. 901Section 250i, , , provided for alienation of reindeer or interests.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1050 Stat. 901Section 250j, , , defined reindeer as used in sections 250 to 250n, of this title.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1150 Stat. 902Section 250k, , , authorized Secretary to promulgate rules and regulations.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1250 Stat. 902Section 250, , , directed Secretary, whenever practicable, to appoint natives to administer the industry.lact Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1350 Stat. 902Section 250m, , , related to use of public lands.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1450 Stat. 902Section 250n, , , defined “Natives of Alaska” for purposes of sections 250 to 250n of this title.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1550 Stat. 902Section 250, , , which authorized appropriation of $2,000,000.00 to carry out sections 250 to 250n of this title, was set out as a note under , and subsequently was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.oact Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1650 Stat. 902section 500 of Title 25Section 250p, , , which repealed provisions inconsistent with sections 250 to 250n of this title, was set out as a note under , and subsequently was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1750 Stat. 902section 500 of Title 25
